seo.title: Middletown NY Real Estate | Summit Realty Group
seo.description: Search luxury homes in Middletown, NY. Top-rated schools, Tudor estates, 16 miles to Midtown. Median price $2.1M. Summit Realty Group.

name: Middletown
tagline: The Crown Jewel of Westchester County
overview: Middletown is Westchester County's most prestigious village — a tightly-held community of grand Tudor and Colonial estates set on tree-canopied streets just 16 miles from Midtown Manhattan. With one of the top-rated school districts in the state, a quaint village center, and an extraordinarily loyal resident base, Middletown consistently commands Westchester County's highest prices.
